description_long: This is a rugged, mid-cut outdoor hiking shoe with a robust build and a sporty design. The upper is constructed from a combination of mesh and synthetic overlays, featuring a muted green base with black and neon yellow accents for visibility and style. The shoe has a reinforced toe cap, a padded collar, and a gusseted tongue for comfort and protection against debris. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with durable eyelets and quick-lace hooks for secure fastening. The outsole is thick and lugged, designed for superior traction on uneven terrain, and the midsole appears cushioned for shock absorption. Branding elements, including the Salomon name and logo, are visible on the side and tongue, indicating a reputable outdoor footwear brand.
description: A rugged, mid-cut hiking shoe with green, black, and neon yellow accents, featuring a lugged sole and Salomon branding. Designed for outdoor use, it has a reinforced toe, padded collar, and secure lacing system.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Salomon branding, neon yellow accents, and the detailed lacing system.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded collar, heel support, and reflective neon yellow details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible mesh panels, synthetic overlays, and the brand name.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the reinforced toe cap, criss-cross lacing, and tongue logo.
attribute_logo: Salomon logo on the tongue and side, white text and emblem on black background
